title: Pa Tho (culture)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Pa Tho''' was an [[Alien/Legends|alien]] culture that had vanished at some point by [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]. They created the [[Great Subcrustal Tubeway]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1stm}}
